query: Set up OpenCode for a new project with model permissions tuned for code review and refactoring tasks.
Wire up the Filesystem MCP server and the GitHub MCP server into OpenCode so they work with natural language commands.
Configure agent mode for OpenCode so it can autonomously run tests and commit changes without prompting.
I need to set up a project-level OpenCode config that overrides the global defaults for my team's workflow.
Add model permission for the Claude Opus model and set up quota limits for different team members.
Write a Bun script to batch rename all files in a directory by adding a timestamp prefix.
Debug this Spring Data JPA query that's returning duplicate results when using a @OneToMany lazy relationship.
Run an accessibility audit on our React login form to ensure it meets WCAG 2.1 AA standards.
Search the web for the latest pricing changes for AWS Lambda invocations.
